name: career-helper
description: End-to-end career support for job seekers - LinkedIn optimization, ATS CV rewriting, interview preparation, interviewer's perspective reports, post-interview coaching, company research, hiring manager identification, networking strategy, salary negotiation, offer evaluation, portfolio/fractional career support, AI readiness assessment, and mock interview simulation
author: Paul Bratcher
notes: v0.5.0 adds 6 new capabilities: Salary Negotiation Coach (region-aware), Offer Evaluation Framework, LinkedIn Video Optimiser, Portfolio & Fractional Career Support (with regional tax/legal), AI Readiness Assessment, and Mock Interview Simulation. All salary/compensation features support UK, US, EU, and APAC regions with currency and regulatory adaptations.
